title: Embassy Group Digital Technologies is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Embassy Group Digital Technologies is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Embassy Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Embassy Group Digital Technologies:
Embassy Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
